settings.description: Blog posts, news, and announcements in one place.<br class="hidden sm:inline"/>Stay on top of what matters.

children.name: How to write a strong post: structure and checklist

settings.title: How to write a strong post: structure and checklist
settings.description: From headline to body—a practical structure and checklist for blog and news content.
settings.content:
Suggested structure

  1. Headline: clear topic and reader benefit
  2. Lead: 1–2 sentences for context and takeaway
  3. Body: problem → approach → examples → caveats
  4. Close: recap key points and next steps

Checklist

  • Is the audience and scenario explicit?
  • Are there reusable steps or templates?
  • Do you add visuals, code, or screenshots where helpful?
  • Is it easy to find later (tags, summary, cover image)?

children.name: News: new content channels are live

settings.title: News: new content channels are live
settings.description: Dedicated channels for News, Announcements, and Blog—clearer taxonomy and a smoother read.
settings.content:
What changed

  • Filter content by tags (blog, news, announcements, and more)
  • The home page highlights the latest items; sorting rules are configurable
  • Information architecture tuned for content sites and navigation

How to use it

  • Ship product updates under News
  • Post critical notices under Announcements
  • Turn playbooks and long-form tips into Blog articles

settings.title: Announcement: holiday support hours
settings.description: Live chat and ticket response hours during public holidays.
settings.content:
Support hours

During holidays, online support hours will be 10:00 – 18:00.

Impact

  • Live chat: responses may be slightly slower
  • Tickets: urgent issues are prioritized
  • Knowledge base: browse and search as usual

Contact

For emergencies, reach us via the site footer or submit a ticket.
